scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern matches gold standard exactly: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active/all_agents_idle predicates, successes=3 default, error=jubilant.any_error. Key facts are accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several additions not verifiable from gold standard: juju.integrate() method, detailed deploy() kwargs (app, channel, num_units, config, trust, resources), Status object attribute access patterns (unit_status.workload.status, unit_status.agent.status, unit_status.address, status.apps[].units[]). Most are plausible jubilant APIs but cannot be confirmed against gold standard. Minor risk of fabrication on the detailed Status traversal paths.
